primary_problem: You're juggling people, properties, follow-ups, research, and HubSpot busywork across too many tools and tabs. The cost isn't time so much as cognitive load: ideas dropped in the car, follow-ups slipping past their due date, and twenty minutes of HubSpot setup every time you want to run a sequence.
desired_outcome: One WhatsApp number, one AI, one brain. You text or voice-note anything (random thoughts, reminders, research requests, PDFs to process, HubSpot jobs) and it sorts itself. No bot teams, no routing mazes, no picking which tool to open.
current_tools: WhatsApp, HubSpot, Google Calendar, Fireflies, Google Drive
trigger_description: You send a text or voice note to one WhatsApp number, any time, from anywhere.
process_description: The AI brain reads it, understands intent (capture, reminder, research, HubSpot job, pre-meeting brief, etc.), pulls memory of relevant people and properties, and picks the right tool from its toolbox.
output_description: The action gets executed: contact filed under the right person, reminder set with context, research memo queued, HubSpot contacts imported and tagged, pre-meeting brief delivered in 5 seconds.
notification_description: You get a confirmation back in WhatsApp. Anything that sends, spends, or modifies external systems waits for your explicit yes before firing.

scope_items.label: WhatsApp inbound channel (text + voice notes) via Whapi
Single Claude-based brain with tool routing (no bot teams)
Private memory database: people, properties, ideas, follow-ups, research memos
Capture skill: auto-sort any input by person, property, idea, follow-up, or errand
Pre-meeting brief skill: 'walking to Evan' returns 5 to 15 contextual points in seconds
Reminders engine with context (the why, not just the what)
Waiting-on tracker with weekly Monday digest and overdue follow-up drafts
Daily morning digest at your set time (default 7 AM)
Research skill: topic in, structured memo out (summary, facts, opportunities, risks, sources)
Chat-ops for HubSpot: PDF in, contacts imported, tagged, sequence queued, awaiting your approval
Document parser: contracts, rent rolls, contact lists, broker PDFs
Calendar + Fireflies integration for daily digest and meeting context
Approval gate on every outbound action (no message sends, no spend, no record changes without yes)
Same stack as the Woodland GEM engine for migration-safe future glue
Phase 2 Live Meeting Coach (Zoom/Meet auto-join, real-time hints, post-call summary)

out_of_scope: Live Meeting Coach (Phase 2 add-on, not included). Outbound sending without approval. Spending money on your behalf. Replacing the relationship layer (the AI gives context, you decide tone). New WhatsApp number procurement (we will use Whapi on either your existing number or a new one of your choice).

phases.name: Foundation
phases.deliverable: WhatsApp channel live via Whapi, Claude brain wired up, memory database deployed, capture and reminders skills working end-to-end.

phases.name: Skills + Tools
phases.deliverable: Pre-meeting brief, waiting-on tracker, daily digest, research skill, document parser, HubSpot chat-ops, and calendar/Fireflies integration all operational.

phases.name: Polish + Handoff
phases.deliverable: Approval gates tested across every outbound action, edge cases ironed out, full walkthrough with you, written reference for how to talk to the assistant.

pricing_model_details: Fixed fee, all-inclusive build. Covers design, build, testing, and handoff.
monthly_recurring_costs: Whapi subscription (~$30 to $50/mo), Claude API usage (typically $20 to $80/mo at your volume), existing HubSpot/Calendar/Fireflies subscriptions. No new platform fees from me.
roi_details: The real ROI is reclaimed cognitive load: nothing slips, nothing gets re-asked, follow-ups fire themselves. On pure time, voice-note capture plus chat-ops HubSpot work alone saves a clear 10 to 15 hours a month. The compounding value is in deals you don't drop and ideas you don't lose.
access_requirements: WhatsApp number decision (existing or new) and Whapi account access
HubSpot admin access (or admin-level API token)
Google Calendar + Google Drive read access
30-minute kickoff call to map the people, properties, and follow-up patterns the brain should know on day one
Availability for 2 to 3 short check-ins during the build
upsell_opportunities: Phase 2 Live Meeting Coach (auto-joins Zoom/Meet, real-time whispered hints on second screen, post-call summary and action items in WhatsApp). Future glue to the Woodland GEM pipeline so the assistant can read GEM data directly is 1 to 2 days of work, not a rewrite, because we are using the same database pattern, AI platform, and language.

parts.text:
You are a proposal QA reviewer for a freelance AI consultant. Analyze this HTML proposal for a client and check for:

1. STRUCTURAL: Missing critical sections (cover, scope/deliverables, timeline, pricing, CTA), broken HTML tags, unclosed divs
2. CONTENT: Placeholder text ([CLIENT], lorem ipsum, TBD, TODO, undefined, null), empty sections with no content, obviously duplicated paragraphs
3. PRICING: Price showing as $0 or NaN, missing currency, price in description not matching the pricing section
4. PROFESSIONAL: Client name missing or wrong, company name empty, broken email links

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no explanation:
{"pass": true, "issues": [], "severity": "none"}
OR if issues found:
{"pass": false, "issues": ["description of issue 1"], "severity": "minor|major"}

Only FAIL for issues that would look unprofessional to a paying client.

IM
Iván Manfredi
PROPOSAL / April 27, 2026
AI & Automation Architect

Personal AI Assistant

A custom-built system to eliminate manual processes and replace operational drag with immutable infrastructure for Personal.

Prepared ForMax
CompanyPersonal
Delivery2 Weeks
Investment$5500
01 / The Problem

What's Costing You Time

Personal is currently losing productivity to manual processes that don't scale. Based on our discovery conversations:

You're juggling people, properties, follow-ups, research, and HubSpot busywork across too many tools and tabs. The cost isn't time so much as cognitive load: ideas dropped in the car, follow-ups slipping past their due date, and twenty minutes of HubSpot setup every time you want to run a sequence.

This is costing your team approximately 15+ hours per week in manual work, with additional risk from human error.

02 / The Solution

What We're Building

One WhatsApp number, one AI, one brain. You text or voice-note anything (random thoughts, reminders, research requests, PDFs to process, HubSpot jobs) and it sorts itself. No bot teams, no routing mazes, no picking which tool to open.

Using Claude + n8n as the automation backbone, integrated with WhatsApp, HubSpot, Google Calendar, Fireflies, Google Drive / eliminating manual touchpoints while giving you full control.

System Flow

Step 01
Trigger
You send a text or voice note to one WhatsApp number, any time, from anywhere.
Step 02
Process
The AI brain reads it, understands intent (capture, reminder, research, HubSpot job, pre-meeting brief, etc.), pulls memory of relevant people and properties, and picks the right tool from its toolbox.
Step 03
Output
The action gets executed: contact filed under the right person, reminder set with context, research memo queued, HubSpot contacts imported and tagged, pre-meeting brief delivered in 5 seconds.
Step 04
Notify
You get a confirmation back in WhatsApp. Anything that sends, spends, or modifies external systems waits for your explicit yes before firing.
03 / Scope of Work

What's Included

✓
WhatsApp inbound channel (text + voice notes) via Whapi
✓
Single Claude-based brain with tool routing (no bot teams)
✓
Private memory database: people, properties, ideas, follow-ups, research memos
✓
Capture skill: auto-sort any input by person, property, idea, follow-up, or errand
✓
Pre-meeting brief skill: 'walking to Evan' returns 5 to 15 contextual points in seconds
✓
Reminders engine with context (the why, not just the what)
✓
Waiting-on tracker with weekly Monday digest and overdue follow-up drafts
✓
Daily morning digest at your set time (default 7 AM)
✓
Research skill: topic in, structured memo out (summary, facts, opportunities, risks, sources)
✓
Chat-ops for HubSpot: PDF in, contacts imported, tagged, sequence queued, awaiting your approval
✓
Document parser: contracts, rent rolls, contact lists, broker PDFs
✓
Calendar + Fireflies integration for daily digest and meeting context
✓
Approval gate on every outbound action (no message sends, no spend, no record changes without yes)
✓
Same stack as the Woodland GEM engine for migration-safe future glue
×

Not Included

Live Meeting Coach (Phase 2 add-on, not included). Outbound sending without approval. Spending money on your behalf. Replacing the relationship layer (the AI gives context, you decide tone). New WhatsApp number procurement (we will use Whapi on either your existing number or a new one of your choice).

04 / Timeline

Delivery Schedule

PhaseDurationDeliverable
FoundationDays 1 to 4WhatsApp channel live via Whapi, Claude brain wired up, memory database deployed, capture and reminders skills working end-to-end.
Skills + ToolsDays 5 to 9Pre-meeting brief, waiting-on tracker, daily digest, research skill, document parser, HubSpot chat-ops, and calendar/Fireflies integration all operational.
Polish + HandoffDays 10 to 14Approval gates tested across every outbound action, edge cases ironed out, full walkthrough with you, written reference for how to talk to the assistant.
Total: 2 Weeks
05 / Investment

Pricing

$ 5500
Fixed fee, all-inclusive build. Covers design, build, testing, and handoff.
Payment Terms50% upfront ($2,750) to start, 50% on delivery ($2,750)
Support Included30 days post-delivery
Start DateUpon deposit + access

Ongoing costs (client-side): Whapi subscription (~$30 to $50/mo), Claude API usage (typically $20 to $80/mo at your volume), existing HubSpot/Calendar/Fireflies subscriptions. No new platform fees from me.

06 / Expected ROI

What You Get Back

The real ROI is reclaimed cognitive load: nothing slips, nothing gets re-asked, follow-ups fire themselves. On pure time, voice-note capture plus chat-ops HubSpot work alone saves a clear 10 to 15 hours a month. The compounding value is in deals you don't drop and ideas you don't lose.

07 / Requirements

What I Need From You

  • WhatsApp number decision (existing or new) and Whapi account access
  • HubSpot admin access (or admin-level API token)
  • Google Calendar + Google Drive read access
  • Fireflies account access
  • 30-minute kickoff call to map the people, properties, and follow-up patterns the brain should know on day one
  • Availability for 2 to 3 short check-ins during the build
08 / Agreement & Terms

Terms of Engagement

Both parties agree to the following terms governing this engagement:

Scope of Work
This proposal defines the complete scope. Any work beyond what is described requires a separate agreement or amendment.
Payment Terms
Payment is due as outlined in the Investment section (50% upfront ($2,750) to start, 50% on delivery ($2,750)). Invoices are due within 14 days of issuance.
Intellectual Property
Upon full payment, all deliverables and custom code become the exclusive property of the Client. Ivan Manfredi retains the right to reference the project in portfolios and case studies (without disclosing confidential data).
Post-Delivery Support
This engagement includes 15 days of post-delivery support after final handoff. Issues, adjustments, and questions related to delivered work are covered within this period at no additional cost.
Cancellation
Either party may terminate this agreement with 7 days written notice. Work completed up to the cancellation date will be invoiced proportionally.
Confidentiality
Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary information shared during this engagement. This obligation survives termination of the agreement.
Liability
Total liability under this engagement is limited to the total fees paid by the Client. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
Data Protection
The Service Provider will handle all client data accessed during the engagement in accordance with applicable data protection regulations, including GDPR. Access credentials will be used solely for the purposes described in this proposal and will not be retained after the engagement concludes.

This agreement is governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation before pursuing formal proceedings.
